title: 542. 01 Matrix
question:
Given a matrix consists of 0 and 1, find the distance of the nearest 0 for each cell.

The distance between two adjacent cells is 1.

 

Example 1: 

Input:
[[0,0,0],
 [0,1,0],
 [0,0,0]]

Output:
[[0,0,0],
 [0,1,0],
 [0,0,0]]

Example 2: 

Input:
[[0,0,0],
 [0,1,0],
 [1,1,1]]

Output:
[[0,0,0],
 [0,1,0],
 [1,2,1]]

 

Note:

  1. The number of elements of the given matrix will not exceed 10,000.
  2. There are at least one 0 in the given matrix.
  3. The cells are adjacent in only four directions: up, down, left and right.
code: class Solution(object):\u000A    def updateMatrix(self, matrix):\u000A        \u0022\u0022\u0022\u000A        :type matrix: List[List[int]]\u000A        :rtype: List[List[int]]\u000A        \u0022\u0022\u0022\u000A        def get_adj(i, j):\u000A            return filter(lambda pos: 0 \u003C\u003D pos[0] \u003C len(matrix) and 0 \u003C\u003D pos[1] \u003C len(matrix[0]),\u000A                          [[i \u002D 1, j], [i + 1, j], [i, j \u002D 1], [i, j + 1]])\u000A        bfs \u003D []\u000A        for i in xrange(len(matrix)):\u000A            for j in xrange(len(matrix[0])):\u000A                if matrix[i][j]:\u000A                    set_none \u003D True\u000A                    for adj_i, adj_j in get_adj(i, j):\u000A                        set_none \u0026\u003D matrix[adj_i][adj_j] \u003D\u003D 1 or matrix[adj_i][adj_j] is None\u000A                    if set_none:\u000A                        matrix[i][j] \u003D None\u000A                    else:\u000A                        bfs.append([i, j])\u000A        bfs2 \u003D []\u000A        level \u003D 1\u000A        while bfs:\u000A            level +\u003D 1\u000A            while bfs:\u000A                i, j \u003D bfs.pop()\u000A                for adj_i, adj_j in get_adj(i, j):\u000A                    if matrix[adj_i][adj_j] is None:\u000A                        matrix[adj_i][adj_j] \u003D level\u000A                        bfs2.append([adj_i, adj_j])\u000A            bfs, bfs2 \u003D bfs2, bfs\u000A        return matrix\u000A                        \u000A
